cypher:
MERGE (src1:Source {id:'microsoft_security_research_sqlserver_sqli_cloud_lateral_movement'})
ON CREATE SET
  src1.title = 'Microsoft security researchers identified a campaign abusing SQL Server in Azure VM to move laterally via cloud identity after SQL injection',
  src1.publisher = 'Microsoft'
WITH src1
MERGE (camp1:Campaign {name:'SQL Server (Azure VM) SQLi-to-cloud-identity lateral movement campaign'})
ON CREATE SET camp1.summary = "Attackers exploited SQL injection in an application to gain elevated permissions on a Microsoft SQL Server instance deployed in an Azure Virtual Machine, then attempted lateral movement to additional cloud resources by abusing the server's cloud identity."
WITH src1, camp1
MERGE (tech1:Technique {technique_id:'T1190'})
ON CREATE SET
  tech1.name = 'Exploit Public-Facing Application',
  tech1.tactic = 'Initial Access',
  tech1.summary = 'Adversaries exploit a vulnerability in an internet-facing application to gain access.'
WITH src1, camp1, tech1
MERGE (tech2:Technique {technique_id:'T1210'})
ON CREATE SET
  tech2.name = 'Exploitation of Remote Services',
  tech2.tactic = 'Lateral Movement',
  tech2.summary = 'Adversaries exploit vulnerabilities or misconfigurations in remote services to move laterally.'
WITH src1, camp1, tech1, tech2
MERGE (tech3:Technique {technique_id:'T1078'})
ON CREATE SET
  tech3.name = 'Valid Accounts',
  tech3.tactic = 'Defense Evasion',
  tech3.summary = 'Adversaries may obtain and abuse credentials or access tokens associated with valid accounts, including cloud identities.'
WITH src1, camp1, tech1, tech2, tech3
MERGE (mit1:Mitigation {name:'Secure cloud identities', framework:'', control_id:''})
ON CREATE SET mit1.summary = 'Properly secure cloud identities used by cloud services (including SQL Server) to prevent unauthorized access and lateral movement to cloud resources.'
WITH src1, camp1, tech1, tech2, tech3, mit1
MERGE (camp1)-[c1:includes]->(tech1)
ON CREATE SET
  c1.evidence = 'The attackers initially exploited a SQL injection vulnerability in an application within the target\'s environment.',
  c1.source_id = src1.id,
  c1.page = ''
WITH src1, camp1, tech1, tech2, tech3, mit1
MERGE (camp1)-[c2:includes]->(tech2)
ON CREATE SET
  c2.evidence = 'The attackers then used the acquired elevated permission to attempt to move laterally to additional cloud resources by abusing the server\'s cloud identity.',
  c2.source_id = src1.id,
  c2.page = ''
WITH src1, camp1, tech1, tech2, tech3, mit1
MERGE (camp1)-[c3:includes]->(tech3)
ON CREATE SET
  c3.evidence = 'The attackers attempted lateral movement to additional cloud resources by abusing the server\'s cloud identity (a cloud identity with elevated permissions).',
  c3.source_id = src1.id,
  c3.page = ''
WITH src1, camp1, tech1, tech2, tech3, mit1
MERGE (mit1)-[m1:mitigates]->(tech3)
ON CREATE SET
  m1.status = 'recommended',
  m1.observed_effectiveness = 'Recommended to defend SQL Server instances and cloud resources from unauthorized access by ensuring cloud identities are properly secured.',
  m1.evidence = 'This attack highlights the need to properly secure cloud identities to defend SQL Server instances and cloud resources from unauthorized access.',
  m1.source_id = src1.id,
  m1.page = ''
WITH src1, camp1, tech1, tech2, tech3, mit1
MERGE (camp1)-[sb1:supported_by]->(src1)
ON CREATE SET
  sb1.page = '',
  sb1.quote = 'Microsoft security researchers recently identified a campaign where attackers attempted to move laterally to a cloud environment through a SQL Server instance... attackers initially exploited a SQL injection vulnerability... then ... move laterally ... by abusing the server\'s cloud identity.';

MERGE (cve2024:CVE {id:'CVE-2024-23832'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve2024.summary = 'Critical Mastodon vulnerability stemming from insufficient origin validation, allowing attackers to impersonate users and take over any remote account.'
ON MATCH SET
  cve2024.summary = CASE WHEN cve2024.summary IS NULL OR cve2024.summary = '' THEN 'Critical Mastodon vulnerability stemming from insufficient origin validation, allowing attackers to impersonate users and take over any remote account.' ELSE cve2024.summary END
WITH cve2024
MERGE (cve2023:CVE {id:'CVE-2023-36460'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve2023.published_date = date('2023-07-01'),
  cve2023.summary = "Critical Mastodon bug dubbed 'TootRoot' allowing attackers to send crafted 'toots' that would create web shells on target instances; could lead to full server compromise, access to sensitive user information/communications, and planting backdoors."
ON MATCH SET
  cve2023.published_date = CASE WHEN cve2023.published_date IS NULL THEN date('2023-07-01') ELSE cve2023.published_date END,
  cve2023.summary = CASE WHEN cve2023.summary IS NULL OR cve2023.summary = '' THEN "Critical Mastodon bug dubbed 'TootRoot' allowing attackers to send crafted 'toots' that would create web shells on target instances; could lead to full server compromise, access to sensitive user information/communications, and planting backdoors." ELSE cve2023.summary END;
